title: L'incantevole nemica
writer: Edoardo Anton, Jean Bernard-Luc, Claudio Gora
actors: Silvana Pampanini, Robert Lamoureux, Carlo Campanini
plot: The owner of a cheese factory fears communists and mistakes a meek youth who works for him for one of them. He invites him to his house to win his confidence and the youth falls in love with his daughter.
